bug_report.summary: Sidebar entry “Helpful Links” selection/badge rendering differs after change (highlight/indicator appearance changed)
steps_to_reproduce: Open Zettlr to the main window (with the left Workspaces/file tree visible).
Select the “Helpful Links” entry in the sidebar (as shown).
Compare the visual selection/badge rendering on the “Helpful Links” row between builds.
expected_behaviors: The selected sidebar row (and any badge/indicator on it) should render consistently between builds (same highlight/outline/badge appearance).
actual_behaviors: The “Helpful Links” row renders differently after the change (selection/badge/indicator styling or placement differs within the marked region).

bug_report.summary: Word/character counters are incorrect/inconsistent after change for the same pasted/edited pandoc fenced-div content
steps_to_reproduce: Observe the word/character counters in the UI (top-right counter and bottom status bar for the active document).
Append text to the end of the last line (e.g., add ` More.`).
expected_behaviors: For identical visible document content, word and character counters should match between builds and update consistently after edits.
actual_behaviors: After the change, the counters report substantially fewer words/characters than before for the same visible content (e.g., after appending text, before shows ~6 words / ~36 characters while after shows ~3 words / ~16 characters).
